src: A comprehensive collection of DevOps interview questions with in-depth answers covering CI/CD, Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible, Git, Jenkins, Docker, Monitoring, and more. Ideal for both beginners and seasoned professionals preparing for DevOps positions
ja: CI/CD・クラウドプラットフォーム（AWS・Azure・GCP）・Kubernetes・Terraform・Ansible・Git・Jenkins・Docker・監視などを網羅した DevOps 面接問題集。初心者から経験者まで DevOps ポジション対策に最適
